prompt: This backend can deliver outbound email through more than one transport. Where is the small interface that every email transport must satisfy, and where does the direct-to-server transport actually push a composed message out over the wire?

rubric.answer_shape: one interface, one concrete delivery method

evidence.claim: the interface every email transport satisfies
pushes a composed message over the wire

adjudication.notes: Two independent passes selected the same anchors; no disagreement to resolve.
